hooks.command:
root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; st=$(git status --porcelain); if [ -z "$st" ]; then exit 0; fi; n=$(printf '%s
' "$st" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); names=$(printf '%s
' "$st" | awk '{print $NF}' | awk -F/ '{print $NF}' | head -3 | tr '
' ',' | sed 's/,$//; s/,/, /g'); if [ "$n" -gt 3 ]; then subject="$names +$((n-3)) more"; else subject="$names"; fi; git add -A && git commit -m "$subject" -m "$st" >/dev/null 2>&1 && (git push 2>/dev/null || true); exit 0
